title: Version 2.0 ‚Äî Email Foundation
summary: **Patch intent bands:** `.0` charter ¬∑ `.1`‚Äì`.3` core path ¬∑ `.4`‚Äì`.6` hardening ¬∑ `.7`‚Äì`.8` integration ¬∑ `.9` minor freeze / handoff.
flowcharts:
flowchart TD
    stage["2.0.x Email Foundation"]
    contract["Contract"]
    service["Service"]
    surface["Surface"]
    data["Data"]
    ops["Ops"]
    gate["Release gate"]
    stage --> contract --> gate
    stage --> service --> gate
    stage --> surface --> gate
    stage --> data --> gate
    stage --> ops --> gate

flowchart LR
    gql["GraphQL email module"] --> find["finder mutation or query"]
    find --> go["emailapigo worker patterns plus cache"]
    go --> verify["Mailvetter v1 validate path"]
    verify --> norm["status plus confidence normalize"]
    norm --> cred["credit deduction gateway"]
    cred --> ui["dashboard results plus activity"]
    ui --> gate["2.0 release gate"]

Completed: ‚úÖ Completed: ‚¨ú Incomplete: **contact360.io/jobs** ‚Äî `email_verify_export_stream` processor reuses `EmailExportDAGRequest` (the same schema as email finder export) but verification should add an `email_column` field to specify which CSV column contains the pre-existing email addresses to verify ‚Äî the current schema shares the finder `csv_columns` structure which may not map correctly for pure verification jobs.
